title: CPH2583_15.0.0.503(EX01)
description:
New version:CPH2583_15.0.0.503(EX01)

A system update is available

Interconnection

•Adds a Touch to share feature that supports iOS devices. You can share photos and files with a touch.

•Adds BeaconLink, an app that allows you to call nearby people even if you don't have an internet connection or mobile signal.

•Improves the stability and compatibility of Bluetooth connections.

Apps

•Fixes an issue that might cause apps to lag in some scenarios.

System

•Improves system stability.

•Integrates the January 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.
